name: Unlimited Edition

draft.notes: Basic lands appear on all print sheets, so a land can take the place of a common, uncommon, or rare. No dedicated land slot. Two pack orderings observed (uncommon-rare-common and rare-uncommon-common).

sourceNotes: Sheet layouts and collation identical to Limited Edition Beta. Sold in 15-card booster packs (36/box) and 60-card starter decks. No foils (pre-1999).
